name: Ham Wafers
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Curry Powder, mild (sub Dry Mustard)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend softened butter and ham well.
2. Add seasonings and blend well.
3. Sift in flour and blend well.
4. Divide into 4 parts.
5. Flour hands and shape into 1 1/2 inch rolls and wrap in plastic.
6. Freeze until use or chill for 1 hour in refrigerator. If frozen, thaw for 10 minutes.
7. Slice 1/8 inch thick and bake on lightly greased sheets at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly brown.
8. (Optional) Press a pecan half lightly into each slice before baking.
9. Store in an airtight container or freeze.
